query: SELECT sb.sortOrder, sb.startTime, sb.durationMin, sb.blockType, sb.title, sb.curriculumTopicId, sb.ihAssignmentId, LEFT(IFNULL(sb.description,''), 80) AS descPreview FROM scheduleBlocks sb JOIN dailyPlans dp ON sb.planId = dp.id WHERE dp.date = '2026-05-28' ORDER BY sb.sortOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT sb.sortOrder, sb.startTime, sb.durationMin, sb.blockType, sb.title, sb.curriculumTopicId, sb.ihAssignmentId, LEFT(IFNULL(sb.description,''), 80) AS descPreview FROM scheduleBlocks sb JOIN dailyPlans dp ON sb.planId = dp.id WHERE dp.date = '2026-05-28' ORDER BY sb.sortOrder;
